assertions.text: Script uses exact DS4Bolivia raw GitHub URLs (master branch)
Uses sdg1 as target variable (not imds) in both script and notebook
Both script and notebook import from config.py and call set_seeds()
Uses train_test_split with test_size=0.2 and random_state=RANDOM_SEED
Implements k-fold cross-validation on training set
Uses RandomizedSearchCV or GridSearchCV for hyperparameter tuning
All plt.savefig() calls target images/ directory
CSV result tables saved to tables/ directory
Notebook .md uses correct MyST Jupytext frontmatter
TARGET_LABEL adapts to sdg1 (not hardcoded to IMDS)
Notebook contains interpretation markdown after at least 5 code cells that reference specific numeric output values
Interpretation text explains results in beginner-friendly language with context about Bolivian development
